rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/conceptual synthesis that surveys many prior studies, which increases the chance that individual references are used as background examples rather than deeply engaged. The cited paper is directly relevant to text-based review analytics and sentiment (fit with the editorial’s scope), so it could be a substantive exemplar or method source. However, the matched evidence is only a DOI-level reference list match with no in-text citation context, so there is not enough evidence to safely drop or clearly keep.
